title: Wards may be combined for purposes of this Part
doc_html:
§4649.  Wards may be combined for purposes of this Part

The governing authority may combine two or more wards of a parish for the purposes of this Part.
doc_text:
§4649.  Wards may be combined for purposes of this Part
The governing authority may combine two or more wards of a parish for the purposes of this Part.
